title: Telemetry utility for editor performance monitoring
purpose: Provides functions to emit telemetry events and measure performance timing for editor usage analytics.
module_context: Exports types for editor variant and telemetry events, declares global window interface for telemetry sink, and defines browser detection utility.

steps.content: Check if the window object is defined in the current environment.
Verify that the performance object is also defined.
Return true if both window and performance are available, false otherwise.
Exit early if not running in a browser environment.
Resolve the telemetry sink from the global window object or use a default console debug logger.
Attempt to send the telemetry event through the resolved sink.
Catch and ignore any errors from the sink to prevent telemetry issues from breaking the editor.
If performance.now is available, use it to get high-resolution timestamp.
ELSE fall back to using Date.now for timestamp.
